creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The pointyhat[1] and I can't reproduce it. Try to follow this URL[2]. You need 
to follow "1. When should I make a bug report?" in our bug page[3]. If you 
still have this problem, file PR again with the more details by follow in 
our bug page. 

[1] http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-6-full-logs/docbook-sk-4.1.2_3.log.bz2 
[2] http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-questions/2005-August/095741.html 
[3] http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/bugging.html
